rationale: Tests if the percentage of Nasdaq-100 components outperforming the index identifies broad institutional accumulation.
expected_failure_mode: Index performance can stay concentrated in a few mega-cap names for years, causing missed advances.
stop_conditions: overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
candidate family remains crowded or redundant
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Underperforms QQQ by more than 15% over any rolling 24-month period.
Correlation with standard breadth metrics exceeds 0.85.
